cm.window.title: Plugin / mod settings
cm.tip.click_to_expand: Tip: Click plugin names to expand. Click setting and group names to see their descriptions.
cm.tip.drag_window: Tip: You can drag this window to move it. It will stay open while you interact with the game.
cm.button.set_tooltip: Set the key by pressing any key on your keyboard.
